## Problem
What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the tool or feature you'd like to see.

## Example Usage
How would an AI agent use this? Provide example prompts or tool calls.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions you've thought of.

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
